description_long: This megaphone features a large, metallic conical horn at the front, designed to amplify sound efficiently. The body is primarily cylindrical and colored in yellow and black, with a visible handle on top for easy carrying. A prominent analog gauge is mounted on the side, possibly for monitoring battery or volume levels, and there are metallic adjustment knobs adjacent to the horn. The grip is ergonomically shaped and appears to be made of a dark, possibly wooden or plastic material. The rear section includes a striped, rubberized mouthpiece for speaking, and the overall construction combines metal, plastic, and rubber elements for durability and comfort.
description: A yellow and black megaphone with a large metallic horn, ergonomic grip, top handle, and side gauge, featuring both metal and plastic components.
description_view_0: The megaphone is seen from the rear, highlighting the striped mouthpiece and the alignment of the handle and body.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the full length of the megaphone, the analog gauge, adjustment knobs, and the ergonomic grip.
description_view_2: The front view displays the wide, metallic conical horn, emphasizing the sound projection area.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile shows the handle, grip, and the back of the horn, with less visibility of the gauge.
attribute_mouthpiece_design: Cylindrical, black with yellow stripes, slightly tapered and rubberized for comfort.
attribute_branding_or_logo: White text and markings on the side near the handle.
